commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2e9bf4cde8a77d93244d8031f9d4a15c18246591)
commands.review_summary:
The branch lets QMD-backed `memory_search` use manager-reported search budgets, bounds one-shot CLI QMD cleanup, and updates memory manager typing plus focused tests.

PR surface: Source +295, Tests +357. Total +652 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main uses a fixed 15s tool deadline while QMD manager limits can be higher. I did not establish a live delayed-QMD reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor live QMD proof and maintainer API/availability judgment; automation should not carry the PR while the real-environment proof gate is still unmet.

target.title: fix(memory): honor qmd search timeout and bound one-shot CLI cleanup
target.body:
## Summary

- Honors configured QMD search timeout instead of forcing QMD-backed `memory_search` through the historical 15s outer guard.
- Keeps the default `memory_search` deadline at 15s unless the active QMD manager reports a longer whole-search budget.
- Preserves QMD `AbortSignal` subprocess cancellation behavior from PR #93394 after the rebase.
- Bounds one-shot CLI QMD manager cleanup so pending update work cannot hold tool return indefinitely.

## Real behavior proof

Clean proof was rerun on the PR branch with `CI=1 NO_COLOR=1` and non-watch-mode `pnpm exec vitest run`.

```text
# PR 95347 real behavior proof
# Date: 2026-06-28T13:17:22-04:00
# Branch: fix/memory-search-timeout-config
# HEAD: 2e9bf4cde8a77d93244d8031f9d4a15c18246591

# Working tree

# Diff scope
M       extensions/memory-core/src/memory-tool-manager.test-mocks.ts
M       extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.test.ts
M       extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.ts
M       extensions/memory-core/src/memory/search-manager.test.ts
M       extensions/memory-core/src/memory/search-manager.ts
M       extensions/memory-core/src/tools.test.ts
M       extensions/memory-core/src/tools.ts
M       packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/types.ts

# Full tools behavior proof
✓ tools.test.ts > keeps qmd manager setup on the default memory_search deadline
✓ tools.test.ts > uses the qmd manager whole-search budget for slow memory searches
✓ tools.test.ts > keeps builtin forced-sync retry inside the original memory_search deadline
✓ tools.test.ts > keeps qmd zero-hit forced-sync retry inside one whole-search deadline
✓ tools.test.ts > closes one-shot CLI qmd manager with timeout when forced sync never settles
✓ tools.test.ts > keeps the timeout result when an abort-aware search rejects on abort
✓ tools.test.ts > merges qmd runtime debug across zero-hit retry attempts
✓ tools.test.ts > returns structured search debug metadata for qmd results
✓ tools.test.ts > includes manager acquisition timing and cache-state debug payload

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       26 passed (26)

# QMD abort/timeout/close proof
✓ qmd-manager.test.ts > clears qmd close timeout timers when update waits settle first
✓ qmd-manager.test.ts > uses one qmd close timeout across pending and queued update waits
✓ qmd-manager.test.ts > caps mcporter search process timeout grace
✓ qmd-manager.test.ts > budgets qmd whole-search lifecycles beyond one command timeout
✓ qmd-manager.test.ts > keeps qmd memory_search on the old guard unless the qmd search timeout is raised
✓ qmd-manager.test.ts > aborts the in-flight qmd search subprocess when the caller signal aborts
✓ qmd-manager.test.ts > rejects the qmd search before spawning when the caller signal is already aborted
✓ qmd-manager.test.ts > aborts the in-flight grouped qmd search subprocess when the caller signal aborts
✓ qmd-manager.test.ts > aborts the multi-collection capability probe without caching a failure
✓ qmd-manager.test.ts > aborts the in-flight mcporter search subprocess when the caller signal aborts
✓ qmd-manager.test.ts > rejects the mcporter search before spawning a call subprocess when the caller signal is already aborted

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       17 passed | 133 skipped (150)

# Remaining validation
search-manager.test.ts: 37 passed
qmd-process.test.ts: 20 passed
pnpm tsgo:extensions:test: completed without errors
git diff --check: completed without output
```

This covers the real behavior ClawSweeper asked for: the slow QMD-backed `memory_search` path uses the manager-reported whole-search budget instead of the old fixed 15s wrapper, default manager behavior still keeps the old guard, QMD forced-sync retry remains inside one lifecycle budget, one-shot cleanup is bounded, and the rebased QMD abort/subprocess cancellation paths are preserved.

## Validation commands

```bash
CI=1 NO_COLOR=1 pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-memory.config.ts extensions/memory-core/src/tools.test.ts --reporter=verbose
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/memory-core/src/memory/search-manager.test.ts
CI=1 NO_COLOR=1 pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-memory.config.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.test.ts -t "timeout|abort|close" --reporter=verbose
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/qmd-process.test.ts
pnpm tsgo:extensions:test
git diff --check
```

## Notes for reviewers

The main rebase risk was losing QMD abort propagation that had already landed on `main`. This PR preserves that cancellation behavior while adding the QMD whole-search budget and bounded one-shot CLI cleanup.

The availability tradeoff is intentional: if a user configures a longer QMD timeout, interactive `memory_search` can now wait longer than the old fixed 15s wrapper instead of failing early.
target.author: jason-allen-oneal

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
